import React from 'react' import { Col, Container, Row } from 'react-bootstrap'; import {useTypewriter, Cursor} from "react-simple-typewriter"; function Content() { const[typeEffect]=useTypewriter({ words:["Chutiya","Fuddu","Jahil"], loop:{}, typeSpeed:100, deleteSpeed:60, }) return (

Welcome to my Portfolio,

I'm Alankrit Gupta a{" "}{typeEffect}

 ) } export default Content
